posts.text: All these things seems to be discounted in price in recent crash… It did came to Rs.9300cr market cap when it hit 21.20 last/early this month… Smart people reaped that opportunity and made nearly 2x in a month… Market is forward looking!

posts.author: Azhar_12
posts.community: Ola Electric - Full Stack EV play?
posts.text: MY reasons to stay away from Ola Financial Problems = NO Future cash flow visibility Significant liquidity pressure ongoing Losing 100 cr rs every month operationally on an average significant debt levels [ have same amount of cash but losing 4% for debt. because avg interest cost 10%- fd return 6% for bank balance = 4 %] need significant capital for ramping up production of all the new launches they are launching[2W,BESS] No visibility of near term fund raise Revenue is degrowing and fixed cost is growing A perfect recipe for bankruptcy Competition 8. Insane competition going on in 2w ev indu…
